data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Both pre-bash guards scan full command string. hook_tickets_tracker_bash_guard has ticket-CLI allowlist; hook_review_bypass_sentinel does NOT. Ticket CLI description args containing trigger substrings get false-positive blocked. Fix: add ticket-CLI exemption to sentinel with explicit guard against compound shell operators. ESCALATE: modifies safeguard file per CLAUDE.md rule 22 — requires user approval. Meta note: this very ticket comment was blocked on first attempt because my description contained a triggering substring, validating the bug.
